title: Meteorite Client

body: ![Meteorite title image/logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73592572036b9bfcd0759184f85ec104551f723c.png) Meteorite Client is a fake hacked client that comes with fake hack options **Disclaimer!
